fields.markdownDescription:
List of TenXObject field names to include alongside the main event in output

Specifies TenXObject field names to emit alongside the main event text when writing back to the Filebeat forwarder. When empty (default), only the main event field is written. Example fields: level, group, symbolMessage. (Default: [])

encodeType.markdownDescription:
Output format when outputFields are set. Possible values: [json, delimited]

Specifies how the combined output (main event field plus outputFields) is encoded when writing back to the Filebeat forwarder. Possible values: - **json**: formats all fields as a JSON object - **delimited**: formats field values separated by the output delimiter Only takes effect when filebeatOutputFields is set. (Default: delimited)

configPath.markdownDescription:
Configuration file path

Path containing Filebeat configuration files

logsPath.markdownDescription:
Log file path

Path containing Filebeat log files

name.markdownDescription:
Filebeat log name

Name of the Filebeat files where the logs are written to

path.markdownDescription:
Output path for Filebeat logs

Configures the path where the Filebeat logs are written

interval.markdownDescription:
Enable Filebeat log file rotation

Enable Filebeat log file rotation on time intervals in addition to the size-based rotation

everyBytes.markdownDescription:
Filebeat log file size limit

Configure Filebeat log file size limit. If limit is reached, log file will be automatically rotated (Accepts number or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation)

onStartup.markdownDescription:
Rotate existing Filebeat logs upon startup

Rotate existing Filebeat logs on startup rather than appending them to the existing file (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation)

permissions.markdownDescription:
Log file permissions mask

POSIX permissions mask to apply when rotating Filebeat log files

keepFiles.markdownDescription:
Number of rotated Filebeat log files to keep

Number of rotated Filebeat log files to keep. Oldest files will be deleted first (Accepts number or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation)

inputReady.markdownDescription:
Internal

An internal marker used to indicate Filebeat input ready

files.markdownDescription:
Control log file rotation

Sets Filebeat logging to rotating files. Set logging.to_files to false to disable logging to files. (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation)

stderr.markdownDescription:
Filebeat logging to stderr

Filebeat logging to stderr. Set logging.to_stderr to false to disable logging to stderr. (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation)

syslog.markdownDescription:
Filebeat logging to syslog

Filebeat logging to syslog. Set logging.to_syslog to false to disable logging to syslog. (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation)

rawOutputUnixSocketAddress.markdownDescription:
Internal

Internal variable used to load socket address to be used in multiple encoders
